title: Two major time skips in 30
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Two major [time skips] in 3.0?             Quote Post by lastcody » Thu May 02, 2013 9:24 pm Something I was thinking about. How long is it between the first 6 mins and the next scene with Shinji waking up? How long was Shinji in Welle's possession? One thing that lead me to this was Unit 02 had a huge overhaul after the first scene which leads me to think it might of been a few months to even a year? Another thing was that Risuko said when Shinji asks Misato and Ritsuko to check the entry plug for Rei again. Risuko said (in the UTW subs) "We conducted a thorough search inside Unit 01 long ago " How long is "long ago"? I don't know what Ritsuko's perception of time is, but long ago is not a month at least.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu May 02, 2013 9:30 pm DUDE, the rule is still "no spoilers in titles"! I'm too tired to think of a replacement, so you get an "[omitted]" for now. And a slap on the bottom.

[]:             Quote Post by Pnnn » Thu May 02, 2013 10:05 pm Maybe they've conducted a search long ago (in 2015?) though there were no need or no founds to actually extract Shinji from Unit01, then it was launched in the space. If I'm not wrong, it's also said that Shinji wasn't supposed to come back from Unit01, though he had. Now talking about something really odd, why did they (probably) kept Asuka with the same badly fixed Plug Suit from 2015 to 2029 and suddenly gave her a completely new plug suit in Q? ):

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu May 02, 2013 10:12 pm Pnnn wrote: Now talking about something really odd, why did they (probably) kept Asuka with the same badly fixed Plug Suit from 2015 to 2029 and suddenly gave her a completely new plug suit in Q? ):

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri May 03, 2013 3:06 am My personal theory is that the space helmets Asuka and Mari wore during operation US were salvaged from NERV long ago and were only compatible with the old plugsuits, hence why they were wearing the old ones. For me they have been "wearing" the new plugsuits since a long time, but had to get the old models out of the closet, rapidly patched Asuka's with duct tape, because after operation US it will be back in the closet, and voilà! That would also explain why Mari had the old "05" designation on her plugsuit : her EVA-08 had the time to be achieved/built from scratch between 2.0 and 3.0, but whoever built it didn't had the time or the resource to create a simple plugsuit for her? That's ridiculous. Although I still can't explain why they were still wearing it for the undetermined period of time between US and Shinji's awakening, since their EVAs got the time to get a shiny new upgrade for their armor, and a plugsuit can be changed in what, 2-3 minutes maximum?

[]:             Quote Post by lastcody » Fri May 03, 2013 7:40 am Reichu wrote: DUDE, the rule is still "no spoilers in titles"! I'm too tired to think of a replacement, so you get an "[omitted]" for now. And a slap on the bottom.

[]:             Quote Post by Quadhonk » Fri May 03, 2013 8:56 am Correct me if I'm wrong, but when Ritsuko was briefing Shinji on the whole situation after the Wunder takes off for the first time she tells him that Unit 01 'recenetly' went beserk when trying to recover it. So ever though his sync rate is 0 they place the DSS choker on him (plus because they don't trust him). So from that I can only guess that the operation to recover unit 01, and thereby Shinji, was just before he woke up. I don't think they had been holding him for long. Although, when Ritsuko mentioned the search "long ago" that did throw me a curve ball. Perhaps they searched the plug before Seele sent Unit 01 away but didn't recover Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Fri May 03, 2013 9:53 am ElMariachi wrote: My personal theory is that the space helmets Asuka and Mari wore during operation US were salvaged from NERV long ago and were only compatible with the old plugsuits, hence why they were wearing the old ones. For me they have been "wearing" the new plugsuits since a long time, but had to get the old models out of the closet, rapidly patched Asuka's with duct tape, because after operation US it will be back in the closet, and voilà! That would also explain why Mari had the old "05" designation on her plugsuit : her EVA-08 had the time to be achieved/built from scratch between 2.0 and 3.0, but whoever built it didn't had the time or the resource to create a simple plugsuit for her? That's ridiculous. Although I still can't explain why they were still wearing it for the undetermined period of time between US and Shinji's awakening, since their EVAs got the time to get a shiny new upgrade for their armor, and a plugsuit can be changed in what, 2-3 minutes maximum?

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Fri May 03, 2013 10:39 am Maybe it's the successor to the targeting sight that folds forward from the entry plug seat? Would make sense as the helmet doesn't restrict the range of movement for the pilot's head.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Two major #### ##### in 3.0?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 03, 2013 10:45 am lastcody wrote: Risuko said (in the UTW subs) "We conducted a thorough search inside Unit 01 long ago " How long is "long ago"?

[]:             Quote Post by lastcody » Fri May 03, 2013 12:21 pm I also forgot to say Unit 08 had a huge overhaul as well, so two units being almost completely changed I would think takes some time under the circumstance of the current state of the world after Third impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Fri May 03, 2013 2:33 pm I believe the time skip between the opening battle and Shinji's awakening amounts to a few weeks at most. Basically, enough time to: - Repair Unit-02 after the space battle - Upgrade Unit-08 - Install Unit-01 as Wunder's engine (not yet fully connected and completely untested) In fact, I think it is quite likely that installing Unit-01 into Wunder required removing the entry plug, and triggering Shinji to rematerialize due to being separated from Unit-01's core (housing both Rei and Yui). [ASIDE] As such, Shinji's reappearance is merely a side effect of installing Wunder's engine, explaining why nobody actually at WILLE needs him or wants him. The only thing they might want him to be is no longer a part of Unit-01 , if even that. In effect, Shinji is mostly just a waste product to them, and a potential danger to boot. (Enough that clothing him seems to be an afterthought at best, and a waste of perfectly good hospital supplies at worst.) [/ASIDE] So the time between the space battle and Shinji's awakening would amount to the about the typical time between two angel battles in either of the two first movies.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 03, 2013 4:00 pm Dammit, Jorno! That aside! SPLIT!
